# Crypto Whale Watch
> Monitoring crypto whales, on-chain analysis, and trading signals.

## About
Crypto Whale Watch tracks large cryptocurrency wallets, market maker activity, and institutional money movements. We provide daily analysis of whale transactions, profitable wallet tracking, and trading insights.

## Key Features
- Real-time whale movement alerts
- On-chain wallet analysis (Ethereum, via Etherscan API)
- Market maker activity tracking (Jump Trading, Wintermute)
- Daily profit/loss leaderboards
- Trading signals and market analysis

## Links
- Home: https://kirminator2.github.io/
- Search: https://kirminator2.github.io/search/
- Telegram: https://t.me/forex_signals_fast

- [Ethereum Whales Accumulating: 500K ETH Moved in 24h](https://kirminator2.github.io/posts/ethereum-whales-accumulating-500k-eth-moved-in-24h/)

## Data Sources
- Etherscan API (V2, chainid=1)
- DexScreener API
- CoinGecko API
- DefiLlama API
